text: Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service and pull the latest sensor readings from one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) so a comparative read of operational state can be made.
characteristic_form: The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then summarize the most recent telemetry channels and values for both T-005 and T-013, and call out any qualitative difference between the two.
